meaning: n.<美>[铁](卧车)小包房,(住宿等处的)小房间
examples: I'd like to reserve a roomette.
I would like to reserve a roomette on this train.
"Hey, Robin!" I grabbed her as she passed my roomette.
On the first sector of the journey, my accommodations include a "roomette" with a couchette for sleeping.
Be sure to get a private car, not a shared roomette.
